title: Smoky Italian Casabe Fritters
description: A crispy and flavorful Italian-inspired snack made with casabe, smoky spices, and a hint of French flair. Perfect for munching on while enjoying a cozy evening.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
In a large bowl, combine the crushed casabe, shredded gratin cheese, ground smoky paprika, and dried french thyme.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the casabe mixture into the hot oil, about 1 tablespoon each.
Fry for 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
